executives.name: Clive T. Johnson
executives.background: Mr. Johnson is a founding director of B2Gold and has been the President and Chief Executive Officer since the company's inception in 2007. He was previously a founder of Bema Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Coudriet
executives.background: Mr. Coudriet joined B2Gold in 2014 and has held various senior management roles. He was appointed Chief Operating Officer in 2023.

executives.name: Abhishek (Abby) Khandelwal
executives.background: Mr. Khandelwal joined B2Gold in 2024 as Chief Financial Officer. He previously served as CFO of Pretium Resources Inc.

executives.name: Roger Richer
executives.background: Mr. Richer is a founding director and has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary since 2007.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary

executives.name: Bill Lytle
executives.background: Mr. Lytle has been with B2Gold since 2007 and was appointed Senior Vice President, Operations in 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Clive T. Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Founding director and CEO of B2Gold Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Robert J. Gayton
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Gayton is a Chartered Professional Accountant and has directed several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: George Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Johnson has over 45 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Bema Gold.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental & Social Advisory Committee

board_of_directors.name: Jerry Korpan
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Korpan was formerly Executive Director of Yorkton Securities in London.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin Bullock
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bullock is a registered Professional Mining Engineer and CEO of Signal Gold Inc.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental & Social Advisory Committee

board_of_directors.name: Liane Kelly
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kelly is a Corporate Social Responsibility professional with extensive experience in the mining sector.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental & Social Advisory Committee

board_of_directors.name: Lisa Pankratz
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Pankratz has over 30 years of experience in the investment management and financial services industry.

board_of_directors.name: Thulani Mtshwene
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mtshwene has extensive experience in mining finance and operations in Africa.
